# Biostatistics Practicum {.unnumbered}

::: {.content-visible when-format='pdf'}
\thispagestyle{empty}
\vspace*{4cm}
\begin{center}
{\Huge\bfseries Biostatistics Practicum\par}
\vspace{1cm}
{\Large\itshape Reproducible analysis workflows for
biostatisticians\par}
\end{center}
\newpage
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format='html'}
*Reproducible analysis workflows for biostatisticians.*
:::
